title: [Brayern Isle, Fortress Approach]
description: Half of the path from the beach plateaus here, emerging from the jungle canopy partway up the volcanic mountain.  To one side, lush vines and densely-packed trees block one's advance.  To the other, blue-green logs form a tall fortress wall with lanterns and several violet-hued banners hanging from it.  A flat patch of dirt and volcanic rock away from the wall is home to a small bonfire encircled by river rocks.
